question: How to open the battery compartment when manipulating the boat?
content:
The battery compartment is on the port side of the boat at the stern. To open it, unhook the latch on the battery compartment lid, then open the lid.<PIC>
With the lid open, the battery compartment is exposed.<PIC>
Do not carry flammable substances, heavy items, or metal items in this compartment because they can damage the battery or cause a short circuit, sparks, or fire.
ret: "The battery compartment is on the port side of the boat at the stern. To open it, unhook the latch on the battery compartment lid, then open the lid.<PIC>\nWith the lid open, the battery compartment is exposed.<PIC>\nDo not carry flammable substances, heavy items, or metal items in this compartment because they can damage the battery or cause a short circuit, sparks, or fire.",["Manual09_157", "Manual09_158"]
notes: Answered from the Yamaha 210FSH battery-compartment section. Manual09_157 shows the battery compartment lid and latch; Manual09_158 shows the opened battery compartment.
